.file-embed.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-files-container.background: rgb(25, 25, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(3, 3, 8) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(3, 3, 8) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)) no-repeat scroll 100% 3.75px / 12.375px padding-box border-box, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) url("app://obsidian.md/public/images/6155340132a851f6089e.svg") no-repeat scroll 100% 3.75px / 12.375px padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #E4E5E0 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#E4E5E0, color-mix(in srgb, #E4E5E0 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #E4E5E0 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#E4E5E0, color-mix(in srgb, #E4E5E0 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(3, 3, 8) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
